1.description: get Finnmark county geometry from fylke table

2.description: get all municipalities (to filter by Finnmark geometry)

3.description: select municipalities that intersect Finnmark geometry

5.description: get buildings for municipalities in Finnmark (will filter by kommunenummer list from step 3)

6.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per building to avoid duplicates (group by building id)

9.description: sort municipalities by building count desc

-- STEP 1: query [fylker]
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE '%Finnmark%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
